zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Faxon於1600年出生在英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福時，他的父親William Faxon45歲，母親Ellen41歲。他於1625年6月25日與Joane Fawdry在英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1657年住在美國麻薩諸塞州。他去世於1680年11月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔享年80歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔伊姆 史崔特 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Faxon于1600年出生在英国奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福时，他的父亲William Faxon45岁，母亲Ellen41岁。他于1625年6月25日与Joane Fawdry在英国奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1657年住在美国马萨诸塞州。他去世于1680年11月23日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可布萊崔享年80岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州諾福爾可布萊崔伊姆 史崔特 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Faxon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: Warwickshire dialect variant of Foxon, which is either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Folk (see Foulkes ) or a habitational name from Foxton in Leicestershire.

variants.name: Fawson
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Faxon  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorial list

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Faxon was born in 1600, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, his father, William Faxon, was 45 and his mother, Ellen, was 41. He married Joane Fawdry on 25 June 1625, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Massachusetts, United States in 1657. He died on 23 November 1680, in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80, and was buried in Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Faxon est né en 1600, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Faxon, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Ellen, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Joane Fawdry le 25 juin 1625, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1657. Il est décédé le 23 novembre 1680, à Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Faxon 1600 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Faxon 45 und seine Mutter Ellen 41. Er hat am 25. Juni 1625 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England Joane Fawdry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1657 hat er in Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 23. November 1680 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Faxon è nato il nel 1600 nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Faxon, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Ellen, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Joane Fawdry il 25 giugno 1625, nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1657. Morì il 23 novembre 1680, nel Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Faxonが1600年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフで生まれた時，父William Faxonは45歳，母Ellenは41歳であった。1625年6月25日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフでJoane Fawdryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1657年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州に住んでいた。彼は1680年11月23日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクブレイントレで80歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ノーフォルクブレイントレエルム ストレエト セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Faxon(이)가 1600년 영국 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Faxon(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1625년 6월 25일 영국 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 Joane Fawdry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1657년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주에서 살았다. 그는 1680년 11월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 브레이트리에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 노르폴크 브레이트리 엘름 스트릿 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Faxon nasceu em 1600, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Faxon, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Ellen, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Fawdry em 25 de junho de 1625, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1657. Ele faleceu em 23 de novembro de 1680, em Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Faxon родился в 1600 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Faxon было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Fawdry 25 июня 1625 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1657 году. Он умер 23 ноября 1680 г. в местности бреинтри, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности элм стрит кеметири, бреинтри, норфолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Faxon nació en 1600, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Faxon, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Ellen, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Joane Fawdry el 25 de junio de 1625, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1657. Murió el 23 de noviembre de 1680, en Braintree, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Elm Street Cemetery, Braintree, Norfolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
